title: phanera lingyuenensis
intro: Phanera lingyuenensis, also known as Lingyuan Tree Coral, is a species of climbing plant in the family Anacardiaceae, characterized by its unique, tree-like structure resembling coral. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phanera lingyuenensis include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are commonly consumed in traditional Chinese medicine.
